products.title: PINBRIDGE
products.description: A secure offline-first vault app. Store, encrypt, and sync your sensitive data with zero cloud dependency. Your data stays yours.

products.title: AppLeo
products.description: A beautifully crafted baby tracking app. Monitor feeding schedules, sleep patterns, diaper changes, and milestones — all in one place.

products.title: Lena
products.description: A magical adventure game designed for young children. Choose your avatar, explore colourful worlds, and embark on a journey full of wonder.

products.title: LenaLand
products.description: An enchanted world where kids explore, discover and play. A full creative universe built around Lena's adventures.

products.title: MyKit
products.description: Your personal developer toolkit. Snippets, shortcuts, and utilities — always at hand, always offline-ready.

products.title: Wash
products.description: Smart laundry planner and cycle tracker. Schedule washes, track loads, and never forget what's in the machine again.

products.title: Pilot
products.description: A lightweight goal-navigation tool. Define your destination, break it into waypoints, and fly through your objectives step by step.

products.title: Flowlyne
products.description: Visual workflow and pipeline builder. Drag, connect, and automate your processes without writing a single line of configuration.

products.title: Pulse
products.description: Real-time metrics and personal analytics dashboard. Track what matters, spot trends, and keep your finger on the pulse.

products.title: Bot
products.description: AI-powered bot builder and manager. Create, configure, and deploy intelligent bots for automation and conversational flows.

products.title: Play Store Launch
products.description: Our mobile apps are being packaged and submitted to the Google Play Store. Stay tuned for native Android releases of Oryxen Labs products.

repositories.name: antoleod.github.io
repositories.description: The source code behind this very website. Open, clean, and fully static — HTML, CSS, JS, zero dependencies.

repositories.name: PINBRIDGE
repositories.description: Offline-first encrypted vault. Source code will be published as open source — follow @antoleod for updates.

repositories.name: AppLeo
repositories.description: Baby tracking PWA with offline support, charts, and multi-profile management. Repo coming soon.

repositories.name: Lena
repositories.description: HTML5 kids adventure game with avatar selection, story progression and animations. Repo coming soon.
